narrative:
42 Ohio House district has 70,335 registered voters, with 65.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 7.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 20.1 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +5.0% D−R vs +31.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
